author: Aaron
description: The Remnant — locally-run interactive fiction engine. Dynamic player identity built from your own responses (start as 'Unknown Being'), hoop-and-goo roguelike abductions, permanent Remnant ledger of every being it has ever borrowed (nostalgia is the payoff), in-chat item renaming, four run-endings (restart/voluntary home/death/OOC), auto-saved single-run continuity across ST chats, synesthetic sensory markers, auto-NPC cards, and a codex for items/lore. Shipped as part of the Dockerized Fortress stack.
